name: 5' x 7' Outdoor Rug Ornamental Charcoal - Threshold™: Patio Deck Woven Area, Spray Latex Backing
description: Add a little visual texture to your patio or deck space with this Ornamental Outdoor Rug from Threshold™. The outdoor rug is crafted from a material that maintains a bold look through the elements, and has a spray latex backing to help keep it in place no matter where you place it. Showcasing a modern pattern that pairs easily with a range of different decor styles, this charcoal outdoor rug makes it easy for you to anchor any seating ensemble in style.
